title: Fit test - 1st screen Start Test button
scenario: Fit Test "Start Test" button does not navigate to the second screen as per Figma design on Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app with a device that supports Fit Test connected.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Fit Test.
3. On the Fit Test screen, tap the "Start Test" button.
expected: The second screen (Fit Test in-progress screen) opens as shown in the Figma design.
